architecture.actor: Linear(8,64) → Tanh → Linear(64,64) → Tanh → Linear(64,3) → Softmax

observation_features: avg_score / 100.0            — mean of last-10 history scores, normalised
reward_rate                  — fraction of last-10 evaluations that earned reward
min(band_ratio / 3.0, 1.0)  — target-band power vs baseline, normalised
clip(trend, −1, 1)          — linear slope of last-10 scores / 10

training_results.notes: Reward rate of 67% observed in live server test — within target flow zone [40–75%]

live_deployment.training_isolation: asyncio.create_subprocess_exec — separate process to avoid GIL/OpenMP deadlock

caveats: Trained on synthetic NeurofeedbackEnv only — real user dynamics may differ
No cross-subject validation dataset exists (synthetic environment)
Agent is shared across all 3 protocols — per-user fine-tuning would improve performance
Episode-return metric is a proxy; no gold-standard user-experience ground truth available
